title: lactuca quercina subsp. chaixii
intro: Lactuca quercina subsp. chaixii, also known as Wild Lettuce or Woodland Lettuce, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a sedative and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lactuca quercina subsp. chaixii include relieving insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
